use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF IMPETIGO DUE TO STAPHYLOCOCCUS AUREUS OR STREPTOCOCCUS PYOGENES

indications.text:
ALTABAX® is indicated for use in adults and pediatric patients aged 9 months and older for the
topical treatment of impetigo (up to 100 cm2 in total area in adults or 2% total body surface area
in pediatric patients aged 9 months or older) due to Staphylococcus aureus (methicillin­
susceptible isola...
